overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City. The journey begins ascending from an underground stairwell into bright sunlight, traversing open streets with holographic billboards, navigating a bustling outdoor market, then moving through narrow alleys and elevated industrial scaffolding walkways.

events.description: ascending from dark stairwell into bright daylight at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from dark underground passage toward bright street level

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal edges ascending from darkness
dark metal handrails lining the left side of the stairwell
overexposed bright light marking the exit to street level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit concrete stairwell as the character ascends toward street level. A single pedestrian descends the stairs in the opposite direction. The scene transitions dramatically from shadow to bright daylight as the camera approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban boulevard with holographic advertising

agents.ego_description: walking along wide city street passing palm trees and large digital billboards

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'CIRRUS' text on building facade
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk in the urban environment
tall skyscrapers with neon accents and holographic displays
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide sunlit boulevard lined with palm trees and towering futuristic buildings. Large holographic billboards and digital signage dominate the skyline. The street features crosswalk markings and scattered pedestrians walking in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor market with food stalls and rusty scaffolding

events.description: entering covered market area with food stalls and vendor stands

agents.ego_description: navigating through bustling market stalls with green awnings and neon signs

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall with green umbrella

entered.detail: food vendor stall with green canvas awning and wooden counter
orange-brown metal scaffolding structure attached to buildings
green neon sign reading 'OPEN' hanging above market entrance
traditional round paper lanterns hanging overhead in the market

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered outdoor market area filled with food stalls, green awnings, and hanging paper lanterns. Rusty scaffolding structures line the right side, and vendors tend to their stands. The density of pedestrians increases as the camera moves through the commercial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from market to narrow alley

events.description: entering narrow alleyway with steam vents and graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: exiting market area, crossing open plaza with sparse vegetation, then entering narrow alleyway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking across the path

entered.detail: single landscaped tree in concrete planter in open plaza area
dark entrance to narrow passage between tall buildings
ground-level vent emitting white steam into the alley
wall covered in colorful street art and graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The character exits the market into a brief open plaza with a central tree, then transitions into a narrow alleyway. Steam rises from ground vents, and graffiti covers the walls. The lighting becomes more shadowed as the character moves deeper into the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow service alley with industrial infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit narrow alley with steam rising from vents and colorful graffiti on walls

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the alley

entered.detail: large external air conditioning and ventilation units mounted on walls
elevated metal mesh walkway flooring in the alley
large colorful mural depicting a purple and yellow character
pink neon sign with triple-X symbol indicating adult establishment

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a dark, narrow service alley with industrial ventilation units, metal grating floors, and extensive graffiti art. Steam rises from vents, and the walls are covered in murals and tags. The space feels enclosed and shadowed despite the bright daylight above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial scaffolding with ventilation systems

events.description: descending metal stairs on scaffolding structure

agents.ego_description: navigating elevated metal scaffolding walkways and descending stairs through industrial area with large ventilation fans

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking on lower level of scaffolding

entered.detail: orange metal scaffolding with stairs and platforms creating elevated walkways
massive rotating ventilation fan built into the building wall
red neon sign reading 'SEX SHOP' on upper level of building
large industrial pipes and conduits running overhead

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto elevated metal scaffolding walkways in an industrial zone, descending stairs between buildings. Large industrial ventilation fans, overhead pipes, and neon signage dominate the environment. The metal grating floors and rusted staircases create a complex vertical landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a dim underground passage into the blinding light of a futuristic metropolis before descending back into shadowed industrial corridors. It begins in a concrete stairwell, moving upward past a lone pedestrian as the oppressive shadows give way to a sudden burst of bright daylight. As the character emerges onto a wide sunlit boulevard, the view expands to reveal towering buildings and holographic billboards before shifting into the crowded density of an outdoor market filled with green awnings and paper lanterns. The scene then transitions through a brief open plaza and into a narrow, graffiti-covered alleyway where steam rises from vents and the lighting grows increasingly dim. Finally, the camera moves onto elevated metal scaffolding and rusted staircases, navigating a complex vertical landscape of industrial ventilation fans and overhead pipes.
